name: Bean About Town
tagline: A semi-hidden Kaimuki coffee spot using beans from top mainland roasters — no-fuss, quality-focused neighborhood vibes.
talkStory: This tiny Kaimuki spot rotates beans from acclaimed mainland roasters like Sightglass, Verve, and Heart — the owner hand-picks each selection. The 12th Ave location is deliberately off the beaten path, and the regulars like it that way. No flashy latte art competitions here, just precisely dialed-in espresso and honest conversation. Kaimuki’s food scene is all within walking distance, making this the ideal caffeine launchpad for a neighborhood food crawl.
